SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.allocation

Class MultiMethodAllocator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.allocation.MultiMethodAllocator
public class MultiMethodAllocator extends Object
Runs and compares the three production-allocation facility-split methods of AllocationMethod (component ratio, all-in linear proxy, and isolated stand-alone re-simulation) on a single rigorous base case.

The class can run one method at a time (so an analyst can inspect each in isolation) or run all three and produce an AllocationComparison that auto-evaluates the results and recommends a method. All methods share one component slate and, when mass closure is enabled (the default), each method partitions exactly the same measured (commingled) custody totals using pro-rata component scaling, so the methods are compared on a fair basis.

Method mapping to the allocation-principles matrix:

Facility-split methods and their closure
Method Facility split (ORF) Closure
AllocationMethod.COMPONENT_RATIO One common per-component recovery factor for every source Exact by construction
AllocationMethod.ALL_IN Frozen per-equipment factors via superposition Mass-closed by SourceAllocator
AllocationMethod.STAND_ALONE Per-source re-simulation with the other feeds suppressed Pro-rata component scaling to the measured totals

Usage: 

 MultiMethodAllocator allocator = new MultiMethodAllocator();
 allocator.setBaseCase(process); // already run once
 allocator.addSource("Well-A", wellAFeed);
 allocator.addSource("Well-B", wellBFeed);
 allocator.addCustodyOutlet("ExportGas", exportGas, ProductType.GAS);
 allocator.addCustodyOutlet("ExportOil", exportOil, ProductType.OIL);

 // Run one method:
 ProductionAllocationResult standalone = allocator.allocate(AllocationMethod.STAND_ALONE);

 // Or run all three and compare:
 AllocationComparison comparison = allocator.allocateAll();
 AllocationMethod recommended = comparison.getRecommendedMethod();
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private ProcessSystem
    baseCase
    The rigorous base-case process, already run in its commingled state.
    private String[]
    componentNames
    Cached master component slate, built lazily at the first allocation.
    private final List<CustodyOutlet>
    custodyOutlets
    Tagged custody outlets, in declared order.
    private boolean
    enforceMassClosure
    Whether each method is renormalised (pro-rata component scaling) to the measured custody totals.
    private static final org.apache.logging.log4j.Logger
    logger
    Class logger.
    private static final String
    MASS_FLOW_UNIT
    Mass flow unit used when suppressing and restoring source feed rates for stand-alone runs.
    private static final String
    MOLAR_FLOW_UNIT
    Molar flow unit used internally for reading stream component flows.
    private double[]
    molarMass
    Cached molar mass per component (kg/mol), aligned with componentNames.
    private final List<AllocationSource>
    sources
    Tagged production sources, in declared order.
    private double
    standaloneZeroFactor
    Relative multiplier applied to suppressed source feeds during stand-alone re-simulation.

    Runs all three methods and builds a comparison that auto-evaluates the results and recommends a method.

    allocateAllIn()
    Builds the allocation result for the all-in linear proxy method by delegating to SourceAllocator, which freezes per-equipment split factors and propagates each source through the network by superposition.

    Builds the allocation result for the common overall recovery factor method.

    Builds the allocation result for the isolated stand-alone method.

    Wraps an allocation array in a ProductionAllocationResult using the shared component slate and a uniform per-component diagnostic tag.

    ensureSlate()
    Builds the master component slate (union of components across all source and custody streams) and the aligned molar masses, once per allocator run.

    Sets whether each method is renormalised (pro-rata component scaling) to the measured commingled custody totals so that every method partitions exactly the same metered totals.

    Sets the relative multiplier applied to suppressed source feeds during stand-alone re-simulation (each other source's mass rate is multiplied by this factor).

    Reads the per-source base-case injection component molar flows.

  • Constructor Details

    • MultiMethodAllocator

      public MultiMethodAllocator()
      Creates an empty multi-method allocator. Configure it with the builder-style setters before allocating.

  • Method Details

    • setBaseCase

      public MultiMethodAllocator setBaseCase(ProcessSystem process)
      Sets the rigorous base-case process. The process must already have been run once in its commingled state.
      Parameters:
      process - the base-case process; must be non-null and already run
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • addSource

      public MultiMethodAllocator addSource(String name, StreamInterface feedStream)
      Adds a production source by name and feed stream.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique source name; must be non-null
      feedStream - the feed stream entering the process for this source; must be non-null
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • addSource

      public MultiMethodAllocator addSource(AllocationSource source)
      Adds a production source.
      Parameters:
      source - the source to add; must be non-null
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • addCustodyOutlet

      public MultiMethodAllocator addCustodyOutlet(String name, StreamInterface stream, ProductType productType)
      Adds a custody outlet by name, stream and product type.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique custody outlet name; must be non-null
      stream - the terminal product stream; must be non-null
      productType - the product category; must be non-null
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • addCustodyOutlet

      public MultiMethodAllocator addCustodyOutlet(CustodyOutlet outlet)
      Adds a custody outlet.
      Parameters:
      outlet - the custody outlet to add; must be non-null
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • setEnforceMassClosure

      public MultiMethodAllocator setEnforceMassClosure(boolean enforceMassClosure)
      Sets whether each method is renormalised (pro-rata component scaling) to the measured commingled custody totals so that every method partitions exactly the same metered totals. Default true.
      Parameters:
      enforceMassClosure - true to enforce closure (recommended for fair comparison)
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • setStandaloneZeroFactor

      public MultiMethodAllocator setStandaloneZeroFactor(double standaloneZeroFactor)
      Sets the relative multiplier applied to suppressed source feeds during stand-alone re-simulation (each other source's mass rate is multiplied by this factor). Default 1.0e-10.
      Parameters:
      standaloneZeroFactor - the relative suppression multiplier; must be small and positive
      Returns:
      this allocator for chaining

    • allocate

      public ProductionAllocationResult allocate(AllocationMethod method)
      Runs a single allocation method.
      Parameters:
      method - the method to run; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the allocation result
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the base case, sources or custody outlets have not been configured

    • allocateAll

      public AllocationComparison allocateAll()
      Runs all three methods and builds a comparison that auto-evaluates the results and recommends a method. The non-mutating methods (component ratio and all-in) are run first; stand-alone re-simulation runs last and restores the base case afterwards.
      Returns:
      the comparison of all three methods
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the base case, sources or custody outlets have not been configured

    • allocateComponentRatio

      private ProductionAllocationResult allocateComponentRatio()
      Builds the allocation result for the common overall recovery factor method. A single per-component recovery factor RF[c][k] = metered[c][k] / fieldIn[k] is extracted from the commingled base case and applied to every source's own injection vector. This closes to the measured totals exactly by construction.
      Returns:
      the component-ratio allocation result

    • allocateAllIn

      private ProductionAllocationResult allocateAllIn()
      Builds the allocation result for the all-in linear proxy method by delegating to SourceAllocator, which freezes per-equipment split factors and propagates each source through the network by superposition.
      Returns:
      the all-in allocation result

    • allocateStandAlone

      private ProductionAllocationResult allocateStandAlone()
      Builds the allocation result for the isolated stand-alone method. The process is run once per source with the other feeds suppressed to standaloneZeroFactor of their base rate; the resulting standalone custody component flows are recorded and, when mass closure is enforced, renormalised to the measured commingled totals using pro-rata component scaling. The base-case feed rates are always restored.
      Returns:
      the stand-alone allocation result

    • meteredCustodyMole

      private double[][] meteredCustodyMole()
      Reads the measured (commingled base-case) custody component molar flows.
      Returns:
      the measured custody flows [custody][component] in mole/sec

    • sourceInjectionMole

      private double[][] sourceInjectionMole()
      Reads the per-source base-case injection component molar flows.
      Returns:
      the source injections [source][component] in mole/sec

    • buildResult

      private ProductionAllocationResult buildResult(double[][][] alloc, String method)
      Wraps an allocation array in a ProductionAllocationResult using the shared component slate and a uniform per-component diagnostic tag.
      Parameters:
      alloc - the allocated molar flow [source][custody][component] in mole/sec; must be non-null
      method - the diagnostic method tag; must be non-null
      Returns:
      the allocation result

    • ensureSlate

      private void ensureSlate()
      Builds the master component slate (union of components across all source and custody streams) and the aligned molar masses, once per allocator run.

    • requireConfigured

      private void requireConfigured()
      Validates that the allocator has been fully configured.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the base case, sources or custody outlets are missing

    • getSources

      public List<AllocationSource> getSources()
      Gets the configured sources.
      Returns:
      the sources in declared order

    • getCustodyOutlets

      public List<CustodyOutlet> getCustodyOutlets()
      Gets the configured custody outlets.
      Returns:
      the custody outlets in declared order

    • getBaseCase

      public ProcessSystem getBaseCase()
      Gets the base-case process.
      Returns:
      the base case, or null if not set
